title: Aaina - Hindi - Drama - Shprtfilm
synopsis: "In Lucknow, Naina, a homemaker, is thrown into panic when her daughter Swara goes missing after a night out she reluctantly allowed. At the police station, while filing a report, she encounters grieving parents whose daughter was brutally assaulted and murdered. Relieved when Swara eventually returns home safely, Naina scolds her for her reckless behavior. But as the family prepares for Holika Dahan, the police arrive with shocking evidence—her son Sanskaar is accused of rape. In that devastating moment, Naina is forced to confront the painful truth: the troubling patterns she once dismissed in her son have grown into a monstrous reality."

title: Another Shortfilm About Killing - Thriller - Hindi - Shortfilm
synopsis:

title: The Leap Of Success - Il Salto Di Qualità - Italian - Drama - Shortfilm
synopsis: A multi-million dollar scratch card win stuns a quiet small-town community. But just days after buying the lucky ticket, Teresa—the unexpected winner—dies suddenly. Now, her daughter Linda is left behind, unaware of where the life-changing ticket is hidden.

title: Gallows - Persian - Drama -  Shortfilm
synopsis: "Massoud, a determined teenager, is willing to face every obstacle standing between him and Mina, the girl he truly loves. Driven by unshakable devotion, he resolves to overcome every challenge—even if it means putting his own life at risk."

title: Megathoodham -  Tamil - Love - Shortfilm
synopsis:
"A young girl who is part of a scriptwriting team struggles to come up with a story idea.
After days of thinking, she finally shares a story about a couple who have been in love for three years and recently got married. But their happy life changes when a tragedy strikes the wife. The story then focuses on the husband's emotional decision after the tragedy.
As she narrates, the other writers start questioning the husband's choice. Is it right or wrong?
This leads to a debate, but in the end, a surprising twist revealed to the audience which changes how everyone sees the story and the writer herself."

title: The Dream! - Thriller - Silent - Shortfilm
synopsis:
"A 6-year-old girl sits at her desk, struggling to bring to life the image that burns inside her imagination. No matter how hard she tries, the drawing refuses to take its final shape. Frustration grows—erasures, torn pages, crumpled sheets pile up—until exhaustion overtakes her and she falls asleep beside her unfinished art.

At dawn, with fresh determination, she sets out on her small scooter, carrying her sketchbook close to her heart. She rides through quiet streets until she reaches a forgotten, floating water point—an abandoned place that seems both mysterious and inviting. Here, she prepares to face her art again.

Suddenly, a scream echoes in the distance. Drawn toward the sound, she steps into an eerie silence. In a surreal moment, she plunges her face into the unseen void. Fragments of her emotions—joy, sorrow, fear, longing—flash in rapid, microscopic images, overwhelming her young mind.

Abruptly, Angela awakens, her face wet with tears. It was a dream. The nightmare lingers in her expression, revealing the hidden fears she carries. The camera slowly tilts to her drawing—finally complete, but rendered in a darker, haunting form.
"

title: Lost World 2020 - Bengali - Drama - Pilot Film
synopsis:
Set during the lockdown of 2020, an elderly man leaves his old age home in response to mysterious call and ventures into a deep forest where he encounters five lost souls, each representing the collapse of identity and purpose. Their heartfelt discussions expose the naked truths of a hypocritical society. Together, they walk towards the infinite, where nature and humanity merge beyond social constructs. 

WRITER, DIRECTOR & PRODUCER - MITRA MAZUMDER, LEAD ACTOR- DIPENDERANATH BHATTACHARYA, CO-ACTORS, AJOY DUTTA, TANMOY GANGULY, KEYA DAS

It glows when she speaks—and then it speaks back., She stares at it, stunned. Her world begins to shift
